---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an API improvement, interpreter feature, or ergonomics enhancement
labels: enhancement
---

## Summary

Describe the idea briefly.

## Motivation

What semantics workflow or use case would this unlock or improve?

## Proposed direction

If you already have a rough idea of the API or behavior you want, describe it here.

## Alternatives considered

What are you doing today instead?

## Additional context

Add links, examples, or papers if they help explain the request.
